workstreams.goal: Own shared encoding, density metadata, paths, fonts, policies, save behavior, production batch controls, raster safety, image projection, chart primitives, diagnostics, and visual-quality helpers.
nextSlices: Promote reusable geometry, text, image, and chart behavior from document adapters when more than one package needs it.

Keep classic Deflate/PackBits TIFF and OfficeIMO literal-lossless WebP decoding bounded, fail-closed, and explicit about unsupported variants such as LZW/JPEG TIFF, tiled/planar TIFF, and general WebP.
Keep the managed core-Arabic and bidirectional fallback diagnosed as an approximation; use IOfficeTextShapingProvider for full OpenType shaping.
Keep rendering diagnostics reusable without knowing document-specific source semantics.
Keep streaming, cancellation, progress, conflict, and aggregate-budget behavior consistent across every existing family.

workstreams.goal: Move Excel PNG/SVG export from strong foundation to production-grade visual fidelity while keeping source semantics in Excel and reusable rendering in Drawing.
nextSlices: Burn down tracked visual-fidelity manifest items for comment bodies, conditional icons, pattern fills, rich text, sparklines, stacked text, and shape text.
Improve chart, image, object, and page-slicing parity through focused diagnostics and baselines.
Keep Excel PDF planning and Excel image snapshots aligned where they describe the same worksheet semantics.

workstreams.goal: Keep fixed-size slide export, including binary PowerPoint import, protected by authored and external-reference visual evidence.
nextSlices: Expand approved PNG/SVG fixture gates beyond the dashboard and process-diagram baselines.
Expand placeholder, master/layout inheritance, grouped object, connector, chart, and table-style fidelity in focused slices.
Promote reusable fixed-layout primitives to Drawing instead of duplicating them in the slide renderer.

workstreams.goal: Harden Word's estimated multi-page image export while keeping the distinction from Microsoft Word application-owned pagination explicit.
nextSlices: Expand representative page-range fixtures for paragraphs, tables, headers, footers, and floating objects.
Make overflow, fallback, and estimated-pagination diagnostics stable public contracts.
Keep Word-owned wrapping, sections, fields, and object anchoring separate from Drawing-owned pixels and vector primitives.

workstreams.goal: Keep continuous and paged HTML, email, and EPUB image output format-correct, resource-aware, bounded, and aligned with the shared five-format API.
nextSlices: Add representative continuous and paged visual galleries with embedded, data-URI, and policy-resolved images.
Keep resource-aware asynchronous rendering wired through the shared fluent builder contract.
Keep HTML layout semantics in Html and reusable raster/SVG encoding in Drawing.

workstreams.goal: Expand representative OneNote image-export evidence across pages, sections, notebooks, ink, math, images, and selection.
nextSlices: Add reviewable real-world page galleries without committing heavy transient comparison artifacts.
Keep bounded raster diagnostics and naming behavior on the shared converter contract.
Keep OneNote package semantics separate from Drawing-owned pixels, vectors, and encoders.

workstreams.goal: Keep Visio page and document batch export consistent across PNG, JPEG, TIFF, SVG, and WebP while preserving the native Visio geometry renderer.
nextSlices: Expand loaded-document baselines for stencil artwork, connectors, text, themes, and unsupported-shape diagnostics.
Keep raster allocation bounded before supersampled working surfaces are created.
Route reusable encoding and result contracts through Drawing without duplicating Visio geometry.

workstreams.goal: Extend first-party PDF page-to-Drawing coverage while keeping five-format image export, selection, safety, and diagnostics on shared contracts.
nextSlices: Burn down the generated PDF render capability manifest with focused operator, font, image, transparency, form, and annotation fixtures.
Extend synthesized annotation image coverage only through the shared annotation appearance builder, while retaining approximation diagnostics for missing authored appearance streams.
Keep OfficeIMO-generated PDFs as the strong contract while expanding conservative arbitrary-producer coverage.
Route paged source adapters through PdfDocumentConversionResult so source conversion warnings remain attached to image results.

workstreams.goal: Keep visual proof shared and reviewable without making external comparison tools part of product rendering.
nextSlices: Use Drawing-backed PNG decode/encode/diff helpers with changed-area, MAE, RMSE, and luminance bounds for approved baselines.
Keep optional desktop, Poppler, or other comparison tools out of product packages and clearly scoped to tests/manual review.
Require renderable/nonblank proof and stable diagnostics for every premium rendering slice.
